---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Tryggare
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem description / use case

What problem are you trying to solve, or what workflow is currently painful?
A clear description of the context helps evaluate whether a feature fits the project.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can — mock-ups, user stories,
or step-by-step flows are all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Have you found any workarounds or alternative approaches? Why are they insufficient?

## Is this for a specific church or event type?

Tryggare is designed for church children's ministry, but usage varies widely.
Knowing whether this is specific to your context (e.g. large multi-service church,
small congregation, festival/camp setting) helps prioritise features that benefit
the broadest set of users.

## Additional context

Any other information, links, or references that might be helpful.
